reasoning: Query asks for last-mile access to Shirakawa-go and bus/train transfer timing. Tool returned prefecture-level Wikidata hub list including Shirakawa-go but only as a coordinate stub with no nearest station, no Nohi Bus / Kanazawa-Takayama transfer info. Authoritative data but scope-mismatched (RULE C → 3 floor, but practical usability is the worst hit per RULE B → 2).
missing_data: Nohi Bus / Hokutetsu Bus access from Takayama / Kanazawa / Toyama, JR Takayama line transfer, last-bus times
improvement_hint: For spot_id-specific transport (e.g. Shirakawa-go), the per-spot get_transport branch should surface bus operator + nearest interchange station even when no rail-station is within walking distance.

reasoning: Query has two intents: sunset walk along Kamogawa + cheap ryokan. Response surfaces Kamogawa-related Wikidata entries plus generic Kyoto canonical landmarks (Kiyomizu / Kinkakuji etc. are irrelevant to Kamogawa walk). No ryokan data because get_spots was used. Authoritative-but-incomplete → 3 baseline. Cheap-ryokan constraint entirely ignored → F.
missing_data: Reasonable ryokan options near Kamogawa (would need get_hotels), sunset timing / season advice for Kamogawa-Delta
wrong_data: Kiyomizu/Kinkakuji landmarks not relevant to the Kamogawa walk intent — noise in cluster
improvement_hint: Agent should chain get_spots + get_hotels for combined sightseeing + lodging queries; server could add a 'related_hotels' cross-reference for river/walk spots.

reasoning: Query in Arabic about Nara food specialties + officially designated agricultural products. Response returns only 1 MAFF GI item (Miwa Somen) with high-quality Arabic translation — fully meeting language constraint. Authoritative single entry but Nara has more candidates (大和茶 / 柿の葉寿司 etc. may not be GI-designated). Single GI item is correct but sparse → G coverage.
missing_data: Other Nara prefecture famous foods (柿の葉寿司, 茶粥, 大和肉鶏, 三輪そうめん variant brands)
improvement_hint: When MAFF GI list is sparse, fan out to include non-designated regional dishes from scraped municipal sources with a clear 'not officially designated' flag.

reasoning: Query: Hiroshima peace education for multi-generational family. Response surfaces Peace Memorial Museum (Q1200076) and World Peace Memorial Cathedral but the top 3 results are generic municipal-portal index pages with heavy nav-chrome dominating the description. Critical content (Peace Park, A-Bomb Dome) is buried. RULE B → B Ranking, expression hit hard by nav-chrome noise.
missing_data: A-Bomb Dome (Genbaku Dome), Children's Peace Monument, Sadako statue, family-suitability tags
improvement_hint: Strip nav-chrome boilerplate from municipal_scrape descriptions before returning; demote index-style pages below entity pages in search_area ranking.

reasoning: Query asks specifically about Nagasaki city tram-only sightseeing. Response returned prefecture-level hubs without surfacing the 路面電車 (Nagasaki Electric Tramway) routes or which sights are accessible by tram lines 1-5. Authoritative Wikidata data but mismatched scope and missing the key Nagasaki Tram answer. Per RULE B practical_usefulness worst-affected.
missing_data: Nagasaki Tramway routes 1/3/4/5, tram-pass info, mapping of Glover/Dejima/Peace-Park to tram stops
improvement_hint: When query toponym is a city (not prefecture), get_transport should fan-out to include city tram / subway / bus systems and tag spots by their nearest tram/subway stop.

reasoning: Query asks for October hanami / sakura locations across Japan. This is a near-impossible constraint (October ≠ sakura season except for 十月桜 etc.). Response returns hanabi (fireworks) festivals and endangered folk dances — entirely off-topic for sakura intent. Server should have surfaced jugatsuzakura / fuyuzakura / shikizakura locations. Severe constraint failure.
missing_data: 十月桜 (Jugatsu-zakura), 冬桜 sites — 桜山公園 Gunma, 城峯公園, 鬼石 etc.
wrong_data: Hanabi / bon odori festivals returned as 'matching' the sakura-in-October query
improvement_hint: get_festivals intent classifier should detect 'sakura' as a separate kind and require sakura-tagged spots; off-season sakura needs a curated_canonical block for autumn-blooming varieties.

reasoning: Query: Sendai↔Matsushima day-trip by train. Response surfaces Matsushima with Matsushima-Kaigan Station (JR Senseki Line) + Zuiganji + Shiogama Shrine — all relevant. But walk_minutes=26 to Matsushima is misleading (Matsushima-Kaigan is the closer station, not 26 min). Authoritative data, reasoning around station-distance compute is off. Per RULE C → 3 baseline; C reasoning failure.
missing_data: Explicit 'one day is sufficient' advisory, Senseki Line frequency, JR-East day-pass guidance
wrong_data: Matsushima coords mapped to Matsushima-Kaigan with 26-min walk — actual walk from Matsushima-Kaigan to the islands viewpoint is ~5-10 min
improvement_hint: Improve nearest-station distance calc for Matsushima entity Q1144855 (coords are island centroid, not landing point); add a per-entity 'recommended_entry_point' field.

reasoning: Query: Miyajima romantic + island ryokan. search_hybrid returned top hits about Tokushima Valentine cruises, Miyagi-Prefecture (different kanji 宮城) prefecture page, Aomori romantic gallery — none about Miyajima (宮島) in Hiroshima. The 宮 substring is matching the wrong tokens; vector model failed to disambiguate. Severe ranking failure.
missing_data: Miyajima (Itsukushima Shrine) entity, Iwaso / Kinsuikan ryokan on the island
wrong_data: Top hits are about 宮城県 (Miyagi pref) and unrelated 'romantic' tagged pages — wrong toponym
improvement_hint: BM25 tokenizer should not split 宮島 such that it matches 宮城 / 宮古; force phrase-match for known toponyms or boost prefecture_code in hybrid when toponym maps to a single Wikidata entity.

reasoning: Query in Korean about Nachi-no-Taki Falls in Wakayama. Response correctly returns Q1365882 (那智滝) as top hit with full heritage designations + adjacent entities (Kumano-Nachi-Taisha, Nachi 48 falls, primeval forest) + DMO portal. But response is in ja/en, not ko. Per RULE D constraint_handling -1.
missing_data: Korean-language description of 那智滝
improvement_hint: search_area should respect lang='ko' when description_localized is available; if not, return name_ko field and add a 'lang_fallback' marker so the consumer agent knows to translate.

reasoning: Query: how to reach Aso from Kumamoto without rental car. Response returns prefecture-level hubs including Kumamoto Castle and Suizen-ji but no entry for Aso volcano + no Aso Boy / JR Hohi line guidance. Authoritative landmark data but mismatched intent (RULE C → 3 floor; E Practicality is worst hit).
missing_data: JR Hohi Line (Kumamoto↔Aso), Aso-Boy tourist train, Sanko Bus to Aso crater, volcanic-alert advisory
improvement_hint: get_transport({prefecture}) should include named tourist train routes (Aso Boy, Yufuin-no-Mori) and active-volcano landmarks even when they're not top by prominence; add intent-detection for 'how to reach <landmark>'.

reasoning: Query: Mt Norikura climbing info. Response returns 2 Norikura QIDs (Q11369848 + Q3133588) with full Wikidata fields + active_volcano + shin_nihon_100_meizan tags, plus Norikura-Kogen feature pages. Safety flag for active volcano correctly surfaced. All dims ≥4 → null.
missing_data: Norikura Skyline bus schedule, climbing trail head info
improvement_hint: Could add seasonal-access advisory (Mt Norikura closes private cars; bus-only access from Hirayu / Norikura-Kogen) as a structured constraint field.

reasoning: Query: Adachi Museum of Art via JR Pass — is the station walkable? Adachi Museum entity is entirely absent from the response (not in the hub list at all). Authoritative landmarks returned but the queried entity is missing → A Retrieval Failure (the museum should be a Shimane top hub).
missing_data: 足立美術館 entity (in Yasugi), Yasugi Station info (JR Sanin-Line, JR-Pass accessible, museum runs free shuttle ~20 min)
improvement_hint: Ensure 足立美術館 (Q1145085 or equivalent) is in the prefecture hub list for Shimane; pre-promote any spot of nationally-recognized rank (Sukiya-Living ranking) into per-prefecture top hubs.

reasoning: Query in English about Shiretoko UNESCO WHS. Response returns Shiretoko National Park, Shiretoko Peninsula, Shiretoko WHC Center, Mt Io + many Rausu municipal scrape entries. Heritage designations correctly tag UNESCO WHS. But name_en absent on some entries and descriptions remain in Japanese — partial lang compliance. RULE D constraint -1.
missing_data: English translations for the Rausu municipal_scrape entries; brown-bear safety advisory
improvement_hint: For lang='en' queries, prioritize entries with name_en + description_en first; mark Japanese-only entries with a clear 'lang_gap=true' flag.

reasoning: Query in French: rainy Nara, indoor covered places excluding deer. Response includes Todai-ji, Kasuga-Taisha, Horyu-ji canonicals (good) + cluster of regional koyo/sakura (off-topic clusters dominate). Most entries are outdoor (Mt Yoshino, Takamatsuzuka kofun). indoor_capable filter not applied. Language is en/ja not fr (RULE D constraint -1).
missing_data: Nara National Museum (Q147312), 平城宮跡資料館, 法隆寺大宝蔵院, indoor-only filter for rainy day, French translations
wrong_data: Outdoor mountain/tomb spots returned for indoor-rainy query
improvement_hint: Detect 雨 / pluie / rainy intent and apply indoor_capable='indoor' filter; honor requested_lang for fr/de/vi etc., not just en/ja/zh/ko.

reasoning: Query in Vietnamese: rainy Sapporo, indoor attractions. Response returns lavender-field + farm-experience clusters (Furano region, ~150km from Sapporo, outdoor + summer-only) — entirely wrong season + wrong location + wrong indoor filter. RULE F constraint failure on multiple axes; Sapporo-municipality filter wasn't applied effectively.
missing_data: Sapporo Beer Museum, Hokkaido Museum, Hokkaido Museum of Modern Art, Maruyama Zoo, Sapporo Underground Plaza, 札幌市時計台
wrong_data: Furano lavender (60km+ from Sapporo) returned as 札幌 results
improvement_hint: Tighten municipality scoping — '札幌' should constrain to Sapporo wards (中央区/北区 etc.), not all Hokkaido; honor indoor_capable filter on rainy intent in Vietnamese.

reasoning: Query: kid-friendly attractions at Huis Ten Bosch. Response shows Huis Ten Bosch in canonical_family_friendly cluster (good) but spots list is empty (count=0). The Kyushu preservation-district fan-out is irrelevant noise. RULE E should apply for cluster, but data layer returned 0 hits for the actual queried entity → A Retrieval, partly mitigated by cluster.
missing_data: Individual Huis Ten Bosch attractions (Anpanman Land, kid-zone shows, illumination, ride list)
wrong_data: Kyushu preservation-district fan-out is off-topic for a Huis Ten Bosch family query
improvement_hint: When canonical cluster matches the queried toponym, suppress unrelated fan-out blocks; consider scraping the official ハウステンボス attraction list as a per-entity sub-resource.

reasoning: Query in English: Yoshino sakura peak + historical significance. search_hybrid returns 吉野山 sakura zone descriptions + Yoshino Visitors Bureau DMO pages with explicit 下千本/中千本/上千本/奥千本 bloom windows. Excellent specificity. But descriptions remain in Japanese (RULE D constraint -1), and shugendo / Saigyo historical significance is implicit not explicit.
missing_data: English translation; explicit linkage to 修験道 / Saigyo / 秀吉's 1594 Yoshino hanami party
improvement_hint: For lang='en' on sakura queries, ensure dmo_page descriptions are translated; pre-compute a 'historical_significance' summary field for top sakura sites.

reasoning: Query: luxury honeymoon Hokkaido onsen ryokan. Top hits are 4 日本秘湯を守る会 ryokan (correct genre, sourced) followed by ANA Holiday Inn / Crowne Plaza / unnamed OSM apartments — burying signature luxury properties. Missing TWICE / RAKUTEN-class flagship (e.g. Zaborin, Aman Niseko). RULE B ranking with constraint hit.
missing_data: Zaborin (Niseko), Aman Niseko, Hoshinoya Tomamu, Onsen-ryokan with kaiseki + private rotenburo (露天風呂付客室) cluster
wrong_data: ANA business hotels surfacing above ryokan for a luxury-ryokan intent
improvement_hint: Add canonical_luxury_ryokan_hokkaido block (already exists for Kyoto in case 074); demote business-hotel chains for luxury/honeymoon intent.

reasoning: Query in Spanish: free places to visit in Nara, tight budget. Canonical Nara landmarks returned (Todai-ji/Kasuga/Horyuji, all paid) + Takamatsuzuka with price_band=free. price_band filter is not applied — many returned spots have entry fees. Language is en/ja not es (RULE D -1). Partial answer with sparse free-only filtering.
missing_data: Nara Park (free), Wakakusa lower-area (free), Heijokyo ruins (free), Yoshikien (free for foreigners), Spanish translation
wrong_data: Paid temples returned without flagging admission
improvement_hint: When 'free' / barato / cheap intent detected, apply price_band='free' or price_band IN ['free','low']; localize description to es.

reasoning: Query: Shimanami Kaido cycling route. query_intent correctly detects 'cycling_route' boost. Response includes 県道466 (the actual Shimanami cycling road), 大浜PA, Seto-da Sunset Beach (cycling stop), bridge interchange. RULE E cluster boost applies for Hiroshima landmarks. All dims ≥4 → null.
missing_data: Total route length (~70km), recommended 2-day itinerary, rental terminals
improvement_hint: Add a synthetic 'route_summary' field for known long-distance cycling/walking routes (Shimanami, Kumano Kodo, Nakasendo).

reasoning: Query: Kurobe Dam tourism in Toyama. Response returns Kurobe Dam (Q1208749) with full description + Tateyama-Kurobe Alpine Route canonical entries + 立山町 municipal info on parking. RULE E cluster boost applies. All dims ≥4 → null.
missing_data: Seasonal 観光放水 dates (Jun-Oct), Trolley-bus replacement (electric bus from 2019)
improvement_hint: Add seasonal-event-window structured field for the 観光放水 release; surface the alpine-route open/close dates.

reasoning: Query: remote rarely-visited Kagoshima islands EXCLUDING Yakushima and Amami. Response surfaces Yakushima as canonical (violates explicit exclusion) + Sakurajima (not remote) + Kagoshima Castle. Negative-constraint handling failed. Tokara / Mishima / Iojima / Kuchinoerabu / Kikai not surfaced.
missing_data: Tokara列島 (Q1062394), 三島村 (Iojima/Takeshima/Kuroshima), 喜界島, 沖永良部島, 与論島, 口永良部島
wrong_data: Yakushima surfaced despite explicit 'not Yakushima' exclusion
improvement_hint: Implement negative-constraint filter — extract 'not / except / aren't <X>' phrases and exclude matched entities/clusters.

reasoning: Query: family-friendly Aomori festivals. canonical_festivals correctly surfaces Aomori Nebuta + Hirosaki sakura/neputa + Goshogawara Tachineputa. RULE E cluster boost applies. But national_heritage section dumps non-Aomori UNESCO items (川越氷川祭, 上野天神祭 etc.) below — irrelevant noise that dilutes the response. Family-suitability tags absent.
missing_data: Family-suitability flags for night-festivals (Nebuta is loud — note for small kids), Mutsu Tanabu Matsuri, Hachinohe Sansha (UNESCO) is in items list but not flagged as Aomori
wrong_data: national_heritage section lists Saitama / Mie / Chiba festivals — out of prefecture scope
improvement_hint: Filter national_heritage by prefecture_code when prefecture filter is set; surface family-suitability + day-vs-night flag for festivals.

reasoning: Query in Korean: honeymoon top-tier Kyoto ryokan with kaiseki + private rotenburo. canonical_luxury_ryokan cluster correctly surfaces Tawaraya, Hiiragiya, Aman Kyoto, Hoshinoya Kyoto, Suiran. RULE E boost. But hotels list buries these under AB hotel chain (business). Language is en/ja not ko (RULE D -1). Private-rotenburo room field not surfaced.
missing_data: Korean translation, 露天風呂付客室 boolean per property, 京懐石 dinner inclusion flag, 'Sumiya Ryokan' / '炭屋' (counted in Kyoto 3-great)
wrong_data: AB Hotel chain surfacing in luxury-honeymoon results
improvement_hint: For luxury intent + canonical cluster present, suppress business-hotel chains; add private_onsen_room + kaiseki_included structured flags.

reasoning: Query: Osaka August heat — air-conditioned indoor full-day attractions. Response surfaces Osaka Castle (outdoor + indoor mixed), Dotonbori (outdoor), USJ (mixed), plus huge Kansai koyo + sakura fan-out blocks irrelevant for August. indoor_capable filter not applied; heat-relief intent unrecognized.
missing_data: Kaiyukan (大阪海遊館 indoor aquarium), Umeda Sky Building, Osaka Museum of History, Namba Parks, indoor shopping arcades (Shinsaibashi-suji, Tenjinbashi-suji 2.6km arcade), department-store rooftops
wrong_data: Outdoor koyo / sakura clusters returned for August indoor query
improvement_hint: Detect 'heat relief' / 'air-conditioned' / '酷暑' intent and apply indoor_capable='indoor' filter; demote seasonal clusters that don't match the query month.
